ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any significant medical history of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach within the organization */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., offense, defense, special teams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., Physician, Physiotherapist) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of medical specialization (e.g., orthopedic, sports medicine) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in sports medicine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who has the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, healed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for whom the status is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the status record */,
  "wed_status" TEXT /* Status for Wednesday (e.g., Limited Participation) */,
  "thu_status" TEXT /* Status for Thursday (e.g., Did Not Participate) */,
  "fri_status" TEXT /* Status for Friday (e.g., None) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Overall status for game participation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the player's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_status_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation" (
  "rehab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehabilitation program */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injury this rehab program is associated with */,
  "program_details" TEXT /* Details of the rehabilitation program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rehabilitation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the rehabilitation */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Description of the player's progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rehab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehabilitation_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this record belongs to */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment recommended or administered */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Date for follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the alert is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was raised */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the critical update */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Details on how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., strength, agility, practice) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_session_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of participation (e.g., Full, Limited, Did Not Participate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of participation (e.g., Started, Did Not Play, Injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id")
)
